evidence: "I must say that the Superheroine brawl in Grudge Match was some of the craziest cartoon fighting I've ever seen."
"This is what Batman was meant to be."
"They save all the good stuff for the Season Premieres, one or two good episodes in the middle and the Season Finale."
"A whole season of nonsense and a great finale is not what I call a good show."
"The action is non-stop from beginning to end."
"From beginning to end the epic stories just keep making you want to see more and more."
"This is DCAU at it's best. This is one of the greatest superhero cartoons ever made."
"If you haven't seen it. Then You need to."
"This is what Batman was meant to be."
"My favorite scene has to be the airplane scene in the beginning and the official 'Return of Superman.' That's some crazy flying."
"The cinematic style for the show has gotten better but there's not enough ACTION to go with it."
"I think the whole 'I luv Lana, I need Lana, I can't live without Lana,' thing is pretty old."
"Bottom line: 1) Show needs action. Clarke needs to throw more than a punch in a fight."

summary: The user has a strong preference for action-packed superhero narratives with high production quality. They enjoy fast pacing and visual spectacle but express frustration with overly dramatic storylines and lack of character development in some series.
